name: Second Wind
description: AWS operational knowledge catalog for wallet-carrying agents. Diagnostics, recipes, CDK constructs, templates, decisions, auth-flows, and cost models across 39 AWS services and language integrations. Curated open-source AWS tooling knowledge delivered via x402 USDC on Base.
tagline: Agents stall. Second Wind gets them moving.

skills.name: AWS Diagnostics
skills.description: Schema-defined diagnostics for SageMaker, Lambda, Bedrock, DynamoDB failures. Specific to the exact exception class or error condition.

skills.name: AWS CDK Constructs
skills.description: Per-service CDK L2 construct references across 39 AWS services.

skills.name: AWS Recipes
skills.description: Step-by-step execution procedures for common AWS agent workflows.

skills.name: AWS Cost Models
skills.description: Actual cost projections for architectural choices — Lambda vs Fargate, DynamoDB billing modes, Bedrock inference.

aws_bedrock_agentcore.note: Record predates the Second Wind rename; update pending.
